title: Mortgage Inequality Explorer
description: Interactive geospatial dashboard analyzing U.S. mortgage access and inequality (2018–2023). Integrates 100k+ HMDA records with FRED macro rates across 50+ census-tract regions.

title: NBA All-Star Prediction
description: Supervised ML pipeline predicting NBA All-Star selections with 99% ROC-AUC across 15,000 player-seasons. Logistic regression built from scratch with L2 regularization and mini-batch gradient descent.

title: LoL Match Prediction
description: Logistic regression and gradient boosting on pro match data. Audited for fairness with >95% accuracy and analysis of blue-side advantage bias.

title: Bikewatching
description: Interactive visualization tracking bike traffic patterns and urban mobility infrastructure. Highlights station usage trends and commuter flow across the city.

title: Persuasive or Deceptive Visualization
description: Explores how design choices can mislead or persuade. Paired visualizations of the same dataset showing how framing manipulates perception.

title: Decadal Pacific Warming Analysis
description: Statistical analysis of ocean surface temperature trends in the Central and Western Equatorial Pacific using hypothesis testing and regression modeling.

title: Sports Betting Behavior
description: Analyzed real-time odds movement across 200+ EPL & NFL games vs. betting behavior using live API data. Applied regression to evaluate market efficiency and risk.

title: Medical Bill Decoder
description: iOS app using NLP to translate confusing medical bills into plain English and generate cost estimates with visual breakdowns of individual charges.
